steps.title: Focus on active nature
steps.content: The claim asks for nature shown as an active participant in a nighttime scene on water. The best quotation must show a natural element doing something humanlike, not merely appearing in the scene.

steps.title: Compare the images
steps.content: B shows water simply rippling against a canoe. C describes petals rather than a nighttime water scene. D presents the moon as unchanging and does not mention water. The matching quotation makes the moon actively write through the water. The answer is A.
